shared_properties: Silhouette fits inside 120x180 px with academy coat tails, wand hand, and card fan readable from a three-quarter lower-left stance.
Core palette metadata remains primary #5C3317, background #2B1B17, and accent #D4AF37 while accent spell colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Outline thickness stays at 2 px and the costume keeps gold-trimmed navy fabric with warm skin highlights.
differences: Eight frames show a calm breathing loop, subtle cape sway, and a restrained card-hand motion while no projectile is inside the reaction window.
The wand tip holds a dormant amber glow instead of an active reflection ring.
Feet stay planted on the lower podium so the stance reads as ready but not yet committed to a counter.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the duel loop, projectile attributes, UI layout, and Bevy runtime constraints for Reflect Academy.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the warm academy hall mood, layered duel composition, and luminous spell contrast.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the student duelist silhouette, costume trim, wand handling, and heroic stance.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load player_duelist_idle_loop.png during Loading and build a 4x2 TextureAtlasLayout before the duel scene spawns the player entity.
runtime_notes: Advance frames at 8 FPS while the combat state is Neutral and no reflect input has been committed.
Anchor the sprite at the lower podium center with the feet aligned to the shared duel floor baseline.
Keep the animation readable against dark maroon architecture by preserving a bright gold shoulder trim and a clear face silhouette.

context.usage: Displayed during neutral duel time between projectile warnings and committed counter states.

silhouette_notes: Wand hand stays above waist height in every frame.
Cape hem never crosses the foot line so timing reads stay clean.
Card fan remains visible as a secondary shape on the off hand.

acceptance_criteria: Atlas canvas is exactly 480x360 px for eight 120x180 frames with no frame gutter.
The wand, head, and shoulder trim remain readable at 50% preview scale against a #2B1B17 backdrop.
Every frame keeps both feet on one stable floor line so the idle state does not imply a dodge or jump.
